title: 创建 packages/shared domain types 和 FR-ID 常量
description: 在 packages/shared 中定义所有 P0 domain types、协议类型、状态机枚举和 FR-ID 常量。
action: 创建 domain types: Workspace(id, name, execution_domain: 'cloud'|'local_desktop', created_at), Device(id, user_id, type, online, last_heartbeat), Session(id, workspace_id, execution_domain, status, routing_mode), Message(id, session_id, type, content, sender_type, streaming_status), Artifact(id, message_id, type: 'markdown'|'code'|'image'|'file'|'preview'|'diff'|'action_status'), RoleAgent(id, workspace_id, name, role_type, system_prompt, capabilities), RuntimeBinding(id, workspace_id, role_agent_id, runtime_type: 'hosted'|'claude_code'|'codex', execution_domain), RuntimeSession(id, runtime_binding_id, native_session_id, cwd, status), ActionRequest(id, session_id, type: 'preview'|'test'|'build'|'shell', execution_domain, risk_level, status), PendingApproval(id, source_type, risk_level, status: 'pending'|'approved'|'rejected'), TaskResult(id, plan_node_id, role_agent_id, status, summary, changed_files)。创建 FR-ID 常量文件。创建状态机枚举。
implementation: 创建 packages/shared/src/domain/workspace.ts: export interface Workspace { id: string; name: string; userId: string; executionDomain: ExecutionDomain; createdAt: Date } export type ExecutionDomain = 'cloud' | 'local_desktop'

创建 packages/shared/src/domain/device.ts: export interface Device { id: string; userId: string; type: DeviceType; name: string; online: boolean; lastHeartbeat: Date } export type DeviceType = 'desktop'

创建 packages/shared/src/domain/session.ts: export interface Session { id: string; workspaceId: string; executionDomain: ExecutionDomain; status: SessionStatus; routingMode: RoutingMode; createdAt: Date } export type SessionStatus = 'active' | 'archived' export type RoutingMode = 'direct' | 'orchestrated'

创建 packages/shared/src/domain/message.ts: export interface Message { id: string; sessionId: string; type: MessageType; content: string; senderType: SenderType; senderId: string; streamingStatus: StreamingStatus; createdAt: Date } export type MessageType = 'text' | 'system' | 'artifact' export type SenderType = 'user' | 'agent' | 'system' export type StreamingStatus = 'idle' | 'streaming' | 'complete'

创建 packages/shared/src/domain/artifact.ts: export interface Artifact { id: string; messageId: string; type: ArtifactType; content: string; metadata?: Record<string, unknown> } export type ArtifactType = 'markdown' | 'code' | 'image' | 'file' | 'preview' | 'diff' | 'action_status'

创建 packages/shared/src/domain/role-agent.ts: export interface RoleAgent { id: string; workspaceId: string; name: string; roleType: RoleType; systemPrompt: string; capabilities: string[]; allowOrchestration: boolean } export type RoleType = 'orchestrator' | 'engineer' | 'reviewer' | 'tester' | 'custom'

创建 packages/shared/src/domain/runtime.ts: export interface RuntimeBinding { id: string; workspaceId: string; roleAgentId: string; runtimeType: RuntimeType; executionDomain: ExecutionDomain; config?: Record<string, unknown> } export type RuntimeType = 'hosted' | 'claude_code' | 'codex' export interface RuntimeSession { id: string; runtimeBindingId: string; nativeSessionId: string | null; cwd: string; status: RuntimeSessionStatus; capabilities: string[] } export type RuntimeSessionStatus = 'idle' | 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed'

创建 packages/shared/src/domain/action.ts: export interface ActionRequest { id: string; sessionId: string; type: ActionType; executionDomain: ExecutionDomain; workingDir: string; riskLevel: RiskLevel; status: ActionStatus; command?: string } export type ActionType = 'preview' | 'test' | 'build' | 'shell' export type RiskLevel = 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'critical' export type ActionStatus = 'pending' | 'approved' | 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed' | 'cancelled'

创建 packages/shared/src/domain/approval.ts: export interface PendingApproval { id: string; sourceType: ApprovalSource; sourceId: string; riskLevel: RiskLevel; status: ApprovalStatus; decidedAt?: Date } export type ApprovalSource = 'action' | 'plan' | 'permission_escalation' | 'retry' export type ApprovalStatus = 'pending' | 'approved' | 'rejected'

创建 packages/shared/src/domain/task-result.ts: export interface TaskResult { id: string; planNodeId: string; roleAgentId: string; status: TaskResultStatus; summary: string; changedFiles: string[]; diffUrl?: string; previewUrl?: string } export type TaskResultStatus = 'success' | 'partial' | 'failed'
创建 packages/shared/src/domain/index.ts: re-export all domain types

创建 packages/shared/src/constants/fr-ids.ts: export const FR_IDS = { AUTH_001: 'FR-AUTH-001', WS_001: 'FR-WS-001', DEVICE_001: 'FR-DEVICE-001', RUNTIME_001: 'FR-RUNTIME-001', PERM_001: 'FR-PERM-001', WEB_001: 'FR-WEB-001', DESK_001: 'FR-DESK-001', MOB_001: 'FR-MOB-001', CHAT_001: 'FR-CHAT-001', AGENT_001: 'FR-AGENT-001', ORCH_001: 'FR-ORCH-001', CTX_001: 'FR-CTX-001', ARTIFACT_001: 'FR-ARTIFACT-001', RESULT_001: 'FR-RESULT-001', ACTION_001: 'FR-ACTION-001', NOTIFY_001: 'FR-NOTIFY-001' } as const
更新 packages/shared/src/index.ts: export * from './domain' and export * from './constants'
